questions.question: Design a deep learning network for forecasting time series data. Consider using a combination of long short-term memory (LSTM) and convolutional neural networks (CNNs). What are the potential strengths and weaknesses of this approach?

Implement a deep learning network using the Keras library to forecast monthly sales data for an e-commerce company. The data is available in a CSV file and has the following characteristics: 12 months of historical data, with a seasonality of 12 months. How do you handle the seasonality in your implementation?

A company has time series data for website traffic, which follows a stationary distribution. Design a deep learning network that can effectively forecast this time series data. Consider using a recurrent neural network (RNN) architecture and a loss function that penalizes large errors. How do you evaluate the performance of your model?
